author: mandy cooper
text: Can't fault this place except our starter turned up with our main coarse, we were rushing with our starter so our main coarse didn't go cold, the food was amazing but would have been so much better if we had the break before starter n main!!!!

author: Jack Percival
text: Excellent food we went on a Tuesday and had the deal for two a huge amount of food for a reasonable price the cocktails were great too, couldn't fault the service at all brought multiple sauces with the cutlery and checked in often if we needed anything

author: D4rk S3ctor
text: Goat curry not worth it more bone than meat paid £18 not happy 👎🏻

author: Eve Mwaura
text: I went to roots when it first opened pre covid, years ago! And going back now, it's just gotten better. Lovely atmosphere, beautiful food, presented stunningly. The atmosphere is chilled, and open to any occasion. Took my kids (17 year old twins) and it was simply perfect. My son had the lamb chops, my pescetarian daughter had the shrimp, and as I eat small amounts (bariatric surgery 6 years ago) I ordered from the small bites menu and was stuffed! Highly recommended, perfect for a midweek chill out meal, or a weekend night out.

author: Mark Abthorpe
text: Enjoyed the Curry Goat (go easy as it contains bones but tasty and well worth the effort. The Cocktails were great too especially the Flaming Zombie
